/opt/dtk/bin/aicc -DJENGA_DKDV_EXPERIMENT_BTRANS -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/tile_example_jenga_bwd_dkdv.dir/jenga_bwd_dkdv.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/tile_example_jenga_bwd_dkdv  ../../../lib/libutility.a /opt/dtk/hip/lib/libgalaxyhip.so.5.2.26113.2065-6699a1f0 --hip-link --offload-arch=gfx936 -L"/opt/dtk/llvm/lib/clang/17.0.0/include/../lib/linux" -lclang_rt.builtins-x86_64
